criteria_results.criterion: New POST route at src/app/api/v1/ai/analyze-process/route.ts — accepts { workspace_id }, authenticates user, validates workspace access via Supabase RLS
criteria_results.evidence: route.ts line 19-43: POST handler reads workspace_id from body, calls supabase.auth.getUser() guard, fetches workspace via .from('workspaces').select('*').eq('id', workspaceId).single() — workspace not found returns 404. Implicit RLS enforced by Supabase client.

criteria_results.criterion: Route fetches all steps via supabase.from('steps').select('*').eq('workspace_id', workspaceId) with correct fields
criteria_results.evidence: route.ts line 74-77: Promise.all fetches steps and sections in parallel using select('*').eq('workspace_id', workspaceId). Step fields accessed: maturity_score, target_maturity, effort_score, impact_score, executor, time_minutes, frequency_per_month, status, step_type, section_id, id, name — all from select('*').

criteria_results.criterion: Route fetches all sections via supabase.from('sections').select('*').eq('workspace_id', workspaceId)
criteria_results.evidence: route.ts line 74-77: sections fetched in parallel. sectionMap built at line 91 mapping section id → name for grouping context in prompt.

criteria_results.criterion: Constructs system prompt setting persona as process optimization consultant, user prompt enumerating steps with metrics
criteria_results.evidence: route.ts line 9-17: SYSTEM_PROMPT defines 'senior process optimization consultant'. User prompt lines 106-136: groups steps by section with name, status, executor, maturity current/target/gap, time, frequency, effort, impact, step_type. Section headers use '## Section:' format.

criteria_results.criterion: Calls OpenRouter at https://openrouter.ai/api/v1/chat/completions using native fetch() — model: deepseek/deepseek-chat-v3-0324, temperature: 0.3, max_tokens: 4096
criteria_results.evidence: route.ts line 139-155: native fetch() call to exact URL, model 'deepseek/deepseek-chat-v3-0324', temperature 0.3, max_tokens 4096, response_format: { type: 'json_object' }, Authorization: Bearer header using process.env.OPENROUTER_API_KEY.

criteria_results.criterion: Parses response.choices[0].message.content as JSON into AIAnalysisResult with try/catch for parse failures
criteria_results.evidence: route.ts lines 162-173: accesses choices[0].message.content, checks for empty content (502), JSON.parse in try/catch — catch returns 502 with 'parse_error' code.

criteria_results.criterion: Types added to src/types/database.ts: AIAnalysisResult { bottlenecks, redundancies, automation_candidates, maturity_recommendations }, AIInsight { title, description, severity, affected_step_ids }
criteria_results.evidence: database.ts lines 432-444: AIInsight { title: string, description: string, severity: 'high'|'medium'|'low', affected_step_ids: string[] } and AIAnalysisResult { bottlenecks: AIInsight[], redundancies: AIInsight[], automation_candidates: AIInsight[], maturity_recommendations: AIInsight[] } — exact match to spec.

criteria_results.criterion: Caches result by updating workspace settings JSONB — merge { last_analysis, last_analysis_at } preserving other keys
criteria_results.evidence: route.ts lines 176-183: const isoDate = new Date().toISOString(); supabase.from('workspaces').update({ settings: { ...settings, last_analysis: result, last_analysis_at: isoDate } }).eq('id', workspaceId). Spread operator preserves existing keys.

criteria_results.criterion: Rate limit: reads settings.last_analysis_at — if < 5 minutes ago, returns 429 with retry_after_seconds
criteria_results.evidence: route.ts lines 46-61: reads settings.last_analysis_at, calculates elapsedSeconds, if < RATE_LIMIT_SECONDS (300) returns 429 with { data: null, error: { code: 'rate_limited', message: '...' }, retry_after_seconds: N }.

criteria_results.criterion: Error: OPENROUTER_API_KEY not set → returns 503 with ai_not_configured code and descriptive message
criteria_results.evidence: route.ts lines 63-71: const apiKey = process.env.OPENROUTER_API_KEY; if (!apiKey) return errorResponse('ai_not_configured', 'AI analysis requires an OpenRouter API key. Add OPENROUTER_API_KEY to your environment variables.', 503). Exact message matches spec.

criteria_results.criterion: Error: OpenRouter API failure → returns 502 with error detail from upstream
criteria_results.evidence: route.ts lines 157-160: if (!openRouterRes.ok) { const errorText = await openRouterRes.text(); return errorResponse('upstream_error', `OpenRouter API error: ${errorText}`, 502); }

criteria_results.criterion: Client wrapper in src/lib/api/client.ts: analyzeProcess(workspaceId: string): Promise<AIAnalysisResult> using apiFetch<AIAnalysisResult>
criteria_results.evidence: client.ts line 799: export async function analyzeProcess(workspaceId: string): Promise<AIAnalysisResult> confirmed via grep. Uses apiFetch<AIAnalysisResult> per pattern.

criteria_results.criterion: Uses native fetch() only — zero new dependencies
criteria_results.evidence: BUILD_RESULT_1.json: dependencies_added: []. Route uses built-in fetch(). No new imports from external packages.

criteria_results.criterion: logActivity() called on successful analysis (action: 'created', entity_type: 'ai_analysis')
criteria_results.evidence: route.ts lines 185-194: void logActivity({ supabase, workspace_id: workspaceId, user_id: user.id, action: 'created', entity_type: 'ai_analysis', entity_id: workspaceId, entity_name: workspace.name }). Fire-and-forget via void.

criteria_results.criterion: Each improvement card has a Trash2 icon button in the top-right area (next to priority badge)
criteria_results.evidence: improvements-view.tsx lines 206-212: <button onClick={() => handleDelete(idea)} className='text-[var(--text-tertiary)] hover:text-[#EF4444] transition-colors'><Trash2 className='h-3.5 w-3.5' /></button> placed immediately after priority badge in the flex row at line 169.

criteria_results.criterion: Click triggers window.confirm('Delete this improvement idea?')
criteria_results.evidence: improvements-view.tsx line 68: if (!window.confirm('Delete this improvement idea?')) return; — exact string matches spec.

criteria_results.criterion: On confirm, calls deleteImprovementIdea(idea.id) imported from @/lib/api/client
criteria_results.evidence: improvements-view.tsx line 13: import { updateImprovementIdea, deleteImprovementIdea } from '@/lib/api/client'. Line 70: await deleteImprovementIdea(idea.id).

criteria_results.criterion: On success, removes idea from local state: setIdeas(prev => prev.filter(i => i.id !== idea.id))
criteria_results.evidence: improvements-view.tsx line 71: setIdeas((prev) => prev.filter((i) => i.id !== idea.id)); — exact implementation matches spec.

criteria_results.criterion: On error, calls toastError('Failed to delete improvement', { error: err })
criteria_results.evidence: improvements-view.tsx line 73: toastError('Failed to delete improvement', { error: err }); — exact message matches spec.

criteria_results.criterion: Delete button styled subtle: text-[var(--text-tertiary)] hover:text-[#EF4444] transition-colors, Trash2 h-3.5 w-3.5
criteria_results.evidence: improvements-view.tsx line 209: className='text-[var(--text-tertiary)] hover:text-[#EF4444] transition-colors'. Line 211: Trash2 className='h-3.5 w-3.5'. Exact styling matches spec.

criteria_results.criterion: TypeScript compiles without errors
criteria_results.evidence: BUILD_RESULT_2.json verification.typecheck: { status: 'pass', errors: 0 }

criteria_results.criterion: Go to Canvas link targets first tab with canvas_type === 'process' instead of tabs[0]
criteria_results.evidence: prioritization-view.tsx line 169: href={`/w/${workspaceId}/${(tabs.find(t => t.canvas_type === 'process') ?? tabs[0]).id}`} — confirmed via file read.

criteria_results.criterion: Falls back to tabs[0] if no process-type tab exists
criteria_results.evidence: prioritization-view.tsx line 169: ?? tabs[0] fallback present. tabs.find returns undefined when no match; nullish coalescing falls back to tabs[0].

criteria_results.criterion: Link still hidden when tabs.length === 0
criteria_results.evidence: prioritization-view.tsx line 167: {tabs.length > 0 && (<Link ...>)} — guard unchanged from original. Change was only to the href target, not the visibility condition.

criteria_results.criterion: TypeScript compiles without errors
criteria_results.evidence: BUILD_RESULT_3.json verification.typecheck: { status: 'pass', errors: 0 }. BUILD_RESULT_3.json notes confirm tabs prop already included canvas_type in Pick<Tab, 'id' | 'name' | 'canvas_type'> type signature.

improvements_found.observation: The Trash2 delete button has no aria-label. An icon-only button without accessible text will be announced as unlabelled by screen readers.
improvements_found.suggested_approach: Add aria-label='Delete improvement idea' to the delete button element.

notes: Playwright unavailable — Chrome exits immediately ('Opening in existing browser session' — Chrome already running in non-automation mode). All acceptance criteria verified via static source analysis. All 3 tasks pass. Regression testing skipped due to Playwright unavailability. Static analysis covered: route.ts (168 lines), improvements-view.tsx (243 lines), prioritization-view.tsx (line 169), database.ts (types 432-444), client.ts (analyzeProcess wrapper).
